sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104976" key="trike/ramon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ-κέρᾰμον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a liquid measure, ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,SB:6965" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6965</biblScope></bibl>, al.</entryFree>
